name: Baking Powder, Making Our Own
recipeInstructions:
1. To make your own baking powder, combine one teaspoon of baking soda and two teaspoons of cream of tartar for each tablespoon of baking powder called for in the recipe.
2. Store the homemade baking powder in an airtight container to maintain its potency.
3. Use the homemade baking powder within three months for optimal results.
4. This substitution works well for biscuits and other baked goods requiring baking powder.
